changeSet.author: druchek

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [question] WHERE prompt = 'True or False: A primary key can contain NULL values.') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM [question] WHERE prompt = 'Which normal form ensures there are no transitive dependencies?') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM answer_option WHERE question_id IN ( SELECT id FROM question WHERE prompt IN ( 'True or False: A primary key can contain NULL values.', 'Which normal form ensures there are no transitive dependencies?' ) );
